title: osmunda × mildei
intro: Osmunda × mildei, also known as the Osmunda fern, is a hybrid species of the Osmunda genus, which is a group of flowering plants that are commonly referred to as royal ferns. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Osmunda × mildei include its ability to treat urinary tract infections, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and used in decoctions to extract its medicinal compounds.
